title: Humming Vats
lines: The interior of the factory is a maze of copper vats and humming machinery. The sound here isn't just noise; it's a vibration you feel in your teeth.
Yellow-striped blurs zip through the high rafters. You're in the heart of the hive now.
A thick, sweet smell of mutated nectar hangs in the air.

options.desc: 1. Listen to the rhythmic hum of the machinery
2. Move carefully toward the loading docks
